sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66443" key="meso/kopos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσό-κοπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κόπτω</etym>) <sense id="n66443.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of middle size</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">age</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:426" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">426</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0518.tlg001:4:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
